g.title: emitter
g.text: walshadow CH emitter — held-open INSERT pump + DdlApplicator (dual CH TCP)

g.title: cluster_rows
g.text: row path — Emitter::route → held-open INSERT (CH TCP #1)

g.title: cluster_ddl
g.text: DDL path — DdlApplicator (CH TCP #2, separate connection)

g.title: apply
g.text: Added → CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS

g.title: legend
g.text: UInt32 — source xid; recovers xact boundary
DateTime64(6, 'UTC'); xl_xact_commit shifted from PG epoch
surgical close on affected key only
